name: Orion
tagline: Crew vehicle for the Artemis lunar program
description: The crew vehicle for NASA’s Artemis program, built jointly with ESA (the European Service Module is provided by Airbus). Designed to support up to four astronauts on multi-week missions to lunar orbit. Flew uncrewed on Artemis I in 2022.
best_known_for: Crew vehicle for the Artemis lunar program
